case_title: ALEXANDER POZNYAKOV VS. UNISYS CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY RECVD FROM STATE OF CA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF POZNYAKOV, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT UNISYS CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POZNYAKOV, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNISYS CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION $244.25 PRINCIPAL, $3.16 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $427.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ASSIGNEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF POZNYAKOV, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT UNISYS CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION
